solve(Nums, K) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    
    case K of
        0 -> 0;
        _ when K > floor(N/2) -> -1;
        _ ->
            % Define INF constant
            INF = 1000000000000000000, 
            
            % Precalculate Cost[i]
            Cost = [
                I || I <- 0..N-1,
                Left = Nums !! ((I - 1 + N) mod N),
                Right = Nums !! ((I + 1) mod N),
                Required = max(Left, Right) + 1,
                Cost_i = max(0, Required - Nums !! I)
            ],

            % --- solve_linear helper function ---
            % solve_linear(start_idx, end_idx, K_target, initial_cost)
            solve_linear(StartIdx, EndIdx, KTarget, InitialCost) ->
                KTarget < 0 -> INF;
                StartIdx > EndIdx ->
                    case KTarget of
                        0 -> InitialCost;
                        _ -> INF
                    end;
                
                % Iterative DP simulation
                % P: previous DP state (list of size KTarget+1)
                % P !! j = [P[j][0], P[j][1]]
                % P[j][0]: min cost for j peaks ending at i-1, i-1 NOT selected
                % P[j][1]: min cost for j peaks ending at i-1, i-1 IS selected

                % Initialization for i = StartIdx
                P_init = [
                    [0, INF] | [_] <- 0..KTarget-1
                ],
                P_init_mod = P_init !! 0, % P[0] = [0, INF]
                
                % Special handling for j=1 based on StartIdx being selected
                P_start_idx = [
                    P_init_mod,
                    [INF, Cost !! StartIdx] | [_] <- 2..KTarget
                ],
                
                % Recursive loop function simulating iteration i = StartIdx + 1 to EndIdx
                loop(CurrIdx, PrevDP) ->
                    CurrIdx > EndIdx ->
                        % Final result: min(P[KTarget][0], P[KTarget][1]) + initial_cost
                        min(PrevDP !! KTarget !! 0, PrevDP !! KTarget !! 1) + InitialCost;
                    
                    loop(CurrIdx + 1, NextDP) ->
                        % Calculate NextDP based on PrevDP at CurrIdx
                        NextDP = [
                            NextDP_j0 || J <- 0..KTarget
                        ],
                        
                        NextDP_j0 = [
                            % Case 0: CurrIdx NOT selected (s=0)
                            min(PrevDP !! J !! 0, PrevDP !! J !! 1),
                            
                            % Case 1: CurrIdx IS selected (s=1)
                            case J of
                                0 -> INF;
                                _ ->
                                    PrevDP !! (J - 1) !! 0 + Cost !! CurrIdx
                            end
                        ],
                        
                        loop(CurrIdx + 1, NextDP)
                    end,
                
                % Start the loop from StartIdx + 1
                loop(StartIdx + 1, P_start_idx)


            % --- Case 1: Index 0 is NOT selected (s_0 = 0) ---
            % Solve linear DP on indices [1, N-1] for K peaks. Initial cost 0.
            Result1 = solve_linear(1, N - 1, K, 0),

            % --- Case 2: Index 0 IS selected (s_0 = 1) ---
            Result2 = 
                case K of
                    0 -> INF; % Cannot be selected if K=0
                    _ -> 
                        % Solve linear DP on indices [2, N-1] for K-1 peaks. Initial cost Cost[0].
                        solve_linear(2, N - 1, K - 1, Cost !! 0)
                end,

            FinalMinCost = min(Result1, Result2),

            case FinalMinCost of
                INF -> -1;
                Cost -> Cost
            end
        end.

        0 -> 0;
        _ when K > floor(N/2) -> -1;
        _ ->

                Right = Nums !! ((I + 1) mod N),
                Required = max(Left, Right) + 1,
                Cost_i = max(0, Required - Nums !! I)
            ],

            % --- solve_linear helper function ---
            % solve_linear(start_idx, end_idx, K_target, initial_cost)
            solve_linear(StartIdx, EndIdx, KTarget, InitialCost) ->
                KTarget < 0 -> INF;
                StartIdx > EndIdx ->
                    case KTarget of
                        0 -> InitialCost;
                        _ -> INF
                    end;

                % P: previous DP state (list of size KTarget+1)
                % P !! j = [P[j][0], P[j][1]]
                % P[j][0]: min cost for j peaks ending at i-1, i-1 NOT selected

-define(INF, 1000000000000000000).

%% The main solving function
-spec solve([integer()], integer()) -> integer().
solve(nums, k) ->

%% Calculates the minimum cost to make nums[i] a peak, assuming neighbors are fixed.
% Returns a list of costs.
calculate_costs(nums, N) ->
    lists:map(fun(i) ->
        Left = nums !! ((i - 1 + N) rem N),
        Right = nums !! ((i + 1) rem N),
        Required = max(Left, Right) + 1,
        Cost = max(0, Required - (nums !! i)),

solve_linear(_Costs, _start_idx, _end_idx, _K_target, _initial_cost) when start_idx > end_idx -> -1;

    % Initialize P for start_idx
    Cost_start = Costs !! start_idx,
    
    % P is a list of size K_target + 1.

    P_init = [

    % Update P for start_idx selection
    P_start = 
        lists:update(P_init, 0, {0, Cost_start}),

    % Iteratively process indices from start_idx + 1 up to end_idx
    P_final = lists:foldl(
        fun(P_prev, i) ->
            % Calculate C (Current DP state) based on P_prev (Previous DP state)

                case j of
                    0 -> {min(P_prev !! 0 ! 1, P_prev !! 0 ! 2), -1}; % j=0: Cannot be selected

                end
            end, lists:seq(0, K_target)),
            
            C
        end,
        P_start,
        lists:seq(start_idx + 1, end_idx)
    ),

    % Final result is min(P_final[K_target][s0], P_final[K_target][s1])
    FinalState = P_final !! K_target,
    MinCost = min(FinalState ! 1, FinalState ! 2),
    
    if MinCost == -1 -> -1; true -> initial_cost + MinCost end.
